goal: Preserve the active DeepSeek instruction-file policy in ContextBuilt state payloads, state policy reports, and SQLite graph relations.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Context rendering obeys the DeepSeek instruction-file policy, but state lineage only records generic context blocks, so later graph queries cannot prove which stable-prefix instruction files shaped the run.
